summary: Completed the first current-mainline live rollout for ADR 0166 by reconverging the API gateway and platform-context surfaces from the rebased `0.162.0` tree, then verifying the canonical `AUTH_TOKEN_MISSING` envelope on both the public and private runtime endpoints.

verification.observed: The 2026-03-26 `make live-apply-service service=api-gateway env=production` replay finished with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=125 changed=27 unreachable=0 failed=0`, and the runtime verify step asserted the anonymous aggregate-health rejection used the canonical error envelope.
`curl https://api.example.com/v1/health` returned HTTP `401` with `{"error":{"code":"AUTH_TOKEN_MISSING"...}}` and a gateway `trace_id` after the replay.
`curl http://100.64.0.1:8010/v1/platform-summary` returned HTTP `401` with the canonical `AUTH_TOKEN_MISSING` envelope after the rebuilt platform-context container loaded the shared error registry.

`POST http://100.64.0.1:8010/v1/admin/rebuild-local` with the mirrored platform-context bearer token returned `{"collection_name":"platform_context","indexed_chunks":2550,"source":"/opt/platform-context/corpus"}`.
`POST http://100.64.0.1:8010/v1/context/query` with the mirrored bearer token returned HTTP `200` and cited `matches` entries sourced from the mirrored corpus.

notes: Public SSH reachability to `203.0.113.1:22` remained intermittent during the live replay, so the successful path used direct Tailscale host access to `ops@100.64.0.1` and the governed Proxmox guest jump for `docker-runtime-lv3`.

The repo-managed `rag-context` converge stalled during the mirrored corpus copy before `/opt/platform-context/corpus/config/error-codes.yaml` reached the guest. The rollout was completed by rebuilding `platform-context-api` directly with `docker compose up -d --build --remove-orphans`, copying the missing registry file into the mirrored corpus, and restarting the container before the final verification probes.
